categories.name: Functions
categories.description: Function and method definitions, calls, lambdas

mappings.syntaxPattern: // Go has no ternary; use if/else
// Go uses channels for generator pattern
// Go has no default params; use variadic or option pattern
// Go has no tuples; use struct
// Go has no nullish; check nil explicitly
// Go has no destructuring; access fields directly
// Go: use multiple return or index access
// Go: use for loop to map
// Go: use for loop with if to filter
// Go: use for loop to reduce
// Go: iterate with for k := range {{obj}}
// Rust: use Option<T> or builder pattern
// Rust: use Drop trait or scopeguard
// Java: use Iterator or Stream /* csharp adaptation needed */
// Java: use method overloading /* csharp adaptation needed */
// Java: use record or Pair /* csharp adaptation needed */
// Java: use sealed interface /* csharp adaptation needed */
// Java has no type aliases /* csharp adaptation needed */
// Java: public modifier /* csharp adaptation needed */
// Java: public class /* csharp adaptation needed */
// Java: use List.of() or Arrays.asList() /* csharp adaptation needed */
// Java: no destructuring; access fields /* csharp adaptation needed */
// Java: no destructuring; use index /* csharp adaptation needed */

match {{expr}}:
    case {{value}}:
        {{body}}
    case _:
        {{defaultBody}} /* ruby adaptation needed */

for {{var}} in range({{init}}, {{limit}}):
    {{body}} /* ruby adaptation needed */
{{expr}} if {{expr}} is not None else {{default}} /* ruby adaptation needed */
[{{fn}}(x) for x in {{array}}] /* ruby adaptation needed */
[x for x in {{array}} if {{fn}}(x)] /* ruby adaptation needed */
import * as {{name}} from "{{module}}"; /* php adaptation needed */
